lang.name: English
song.search.label: Search by name (EN / JP / ZH)
song.search.placeholder: e.g. EXIST, Daylight, 六兆年と一夜物語
song.id.label: Or enter Song ID directly
song.chart.label: Custom chart path (optional, overrides Song ID)
song.serial.label: Device serial (leave blank to auto-detect)
song.automode.hint: Detect song & navigate automatically via OCR (ADB only)
jitter.title: Humanization (Jitter)
jitter.hint: Randomizes input to simulate human play. Target Perfect/Good range. Recommended: Timing ±20 ms, Position ±8%, Tap duration ±15 ms.
settings.advanced.hint: Fine-tune event generation. Leave at defaults unless you know what you're doing.
device.step1: Hold phone in portrait (camera up). Short side = width, long side = height.
play.none: No song loaded. Go to Song Setup first.
play.start.title: Start Playback
play.start.hint: Enter the song in-game. Press Start when the first note approaches the judgment line.
play.offset.title: Offset Adjustment
play.offset.hint: Too early → negative · Too late → positive · <kbd>←</kbd><kbd>→</kbd> ±10 · <kbd>Shift</kbd>±50 · <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>±100
extract.title: Extract from game folder
extract.step1:
Pull game data via ADB:
adb pull /sdcard/Android/data/jp.co.craftegg.band/files/data/ ./gamedata
extract.step2: Enter the path below and click Extract. The assets/ folder will be generated.
extract.alt.step2: Download and enter the path in Custom chart path.
log.ready: Ready! Enter the song and press Start.
log.no.song: Please select a song or enter a custom chart path.
song.backend.hid_warn: If you are using HID and it's crashing! Please switch to ADB or enter adb kill-server in the terminal after adding the device.
manual.title: Manual input
extra.buymusic.title: Music Purchase Auto-Clicker
extra.buymusic.desc: Automatically taps through the music purchase flow. Make sure the game is on the correct screen before starting.
autoTrigger.title: Vision Detection
autoTrigger.calib.title: Vision Detection Calibration
autoTrigger.calib.hint: Adjust Y so the detection line sits on the judgement zone. Tune Spacing until all 7 boxes align with each lane. Raise Sensitivity if detection is slow; lower it to avoid false triggers.
autoTrigger.calib.nosignal: No screen feed — connect device & start scrcpy first
autoTrigger.calib.firstuse: First time? Open Calibration to align the detection boxes with your device screen.
song.autotrigger.hint: Vision detects note pattern & auto-starts (first time: Calibrate)
